heading: Able seamen—limited
label: 7308 Able seamen—limited
text: The required service for the endorsement of able seaman—limited, qualified for limited service on a vessel on any waters, is at least 12 months service on deck on board vessels of at least 100 gross tons as measured under , or an alternate tonnage measured under as prescribed by the Secretary under operating on the oceans or navigable waters of the United States (including the Great Lakes).1section 14502 of this titlesection 14302 of this titlesection 14104 of this titleSo in original. Probably should be “12 months’ ”.1
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource section (U.S. Code)730846:672(b)(2)Section 7308 establishes the minimum service requirements for an individual to qualify for an endorsement as able seamen—limited.

Amendments2025—, which directed amendment of this section by substituting “12 months” for “18 months”, was executed by making the amendment for “18 months’ ” to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Pub. L. 119–601996— inserted “as measured under , or an alternate tonnage measured under as prescribed by the Secretary under ” after “100 gross tons”.Pub. L. 104–324section 14502 of this titlesection 14302 of this titlesection 14104 of this title

Temporary Reduction of Lengths of Certain Periods of ServiceSection to be applied by substituting “12 months” for “18 months” for the 3-year period beginning on , see , set out as a note under .Dec. 22, 2023section 3534(j) of Pub. L. 118–31section 7307 of this title

Acceptance of Certain Services Toward Endorsement as Able SeamanService used to qualify for endorsement as able seaman—fishing industry to be accepted as qualifying service toward an endorsement under this section, see , set out as a note under .section 602(e)(3) of Pub.
